header.description: NOTE: This image is a panorama  consisting of 9 frames that were merged or stitched in Adobe Lightroom. As a result, this image necessarily underwent some form of digital manipulation. These manipulations may include blending, blurring, cloning, and colour and perspective adjustments. As a result of these adjustments, the image content may be slightly different from reality at the points where multiple images were combined.
